text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Matikanefukukitaru's debut has finally
arrived!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My heart's racing! Wh-wh-what is this massive
pressure I'm feeling?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been this nervous since I went to draw
my first fortune slip. I left empty-handed because
I had no money, but still...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I just can't relax, Trainer! I'm so anxious.
choice_data_list: I'm sure the gods are with you.
I'm sure the gods are with you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right! I have powerful allies in my corner!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate those inspiring words! Thanks to you,
my heart's stopped completely. Well, it's still
pumping, but you know what I mean!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: All right, let me pray before the race starts...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Glory be to the spinach leaf! Glory be to the
spinach leaf! Your power shall be put to the test!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You got that, gods? It's not my skills that are
being tested here, but yours! I beg of thee, help
me get to the finish line!
